framework.name: China Mobile authoring agent OAuth draft
framework.description: Kehan Yao from China Mobile authored draft-yao-agent-auth-considerations-01, an individual (non-WG-adopted) internet-draft proposing OAuth extensions for AI agent authentication across three modes: agent OBO user, OBO itself, and OBO other agents. This is a Chinese telecom company authoring IETF agent auth work — not a US tech giant.
framework.raw_quote: K. Yao, China Mobile, Intended status: Informational, 20 October 2025

source.title: draft-yao-agent-auth-considerations-01 - Further considerations on AI Agent Authentication and Authorization Based on OAuth Extension
